title: Google STEP Internship
body: A 12-week software internship for first- and second-year undergrads. Competitive pay, mentorship, and the Google network. Applications open in August.

title: Girls Who Invest Summer Intensive
body: Fully funded 4-week program for women pursuing investment management. Covers asset management, private equity, and hedge funds. Housing and travel included.

title: Fidelity Investments Intern Program
body: Summer internships across technology, finance, and business operations. Fidelity actively recruits women and first-gen students. Paid, with mentorship tracks.

title: Rewriting the Code Fellowship
body: A community and fellowship for college women in tech. Access to company partners, events, mentors, and a supportive network of 25,000+ women.

title: JP Morgan Women on the Move Campus
body: Networking events, internship pathways, and resources designed specifically for women entering finance and banking. Apply through campus recruiting.

title: Microsoft Leap — Aspire Program
body: A rotational program for students with non-traditional backgrounds. Includes STEM and business tracks. Microsoft prioritizes diversity in its hiring.

title: Out in Finance & Technology Summit
body: A career summit for LGBTQ+ students entering finance and technology. Interviews, networking, and company expo all in one weekend.

title: Grace Hopper Celebration Scholarship
body: The world's largest gathering of women technologists. Apply for a free scholarship to attend and connect with thousands of engineers and companies.

title: Deloitte National Leadership Conference
body: For high-performing students interested in consulting and business. All-expenses-paid conference with case workshops and recruiter access.

title: Visa Technology Immersion Program
body: A 5-day immersive experience for women in tech at Visa HQ. Job shadow, workshops, and early internship consideration.
